svg.title: Element Content Attributes Events Different Types

section.data-narration: Element Content explains the text or data contained within an element.
section.p: Text Content: The text contained within an element.
Data Content: Other types of content such as images, videos, and audio files.

section.data-narration: Element Attributes provide additional metadata about an element.
section.p: Name: The name of the attribute.
Value: The value of the attribute.
Type: The data type of the attribute.
Default Value: The default value of the attribute if it is not specified.

section.data-narration: Events are occurrences that occur within an HTML document and are triggered by user interactions or other events.
section.p: Keyboard Events: Events triggered by keyboard input.
Mouse Events: Events triggered by mouse interactions.
Form Events: Events triggered by form submissions.
Document Events: Events triggered by changes to the document.

section.data-narration: Event Listeners are functions that are called when an event occurs.
section.p: EventListener: A function that is called when an event occurs.
Anonymous Function: A function that is defined without a name.
Named Function: A function that is defined with a name.

svg.text: Educational Diagram: Element Content Attributes Events Different Types
